title: Possible lateral movement from MERIDIAN-WKS-023
description: Following ALT-2025-0002 (encoded PowerShell) and ALT-2025-0004 (PsExec installation), possible lateral movement campaign from MERIDIAN-WKS-023. Investigation in progress.

title: Suspected account compromise — bchen@meridian.fin
description: Impossible travel alert for bchen@meridian.fin. Account sessions revoked pending investigation. User contacted; claims to be in London only.

title: DLP: bulk email to external domain
description: DLP alert for 47-recipient bulk email from finance team. Confirmed as legitimate mailing list distribution for quarterly report. Closed as false positive.

title: Credential phishing — finance team (2024-Q2)
description: Three finance accounts compromised via credential phishing. Contained in 4 hours. See post-incident report in knowledge base.
